name: 04_Text_Generation_GPT2_Prompts_DL
query: Tafadhali tengeneza mfumo wa uzalishaji maandishi kwa kupakua kiotomatiki mfano wa awali wa GPT-2 ambao utahifadhi katika `models/saved_models/`. Mfumo unapaswa kupokea maelekezo kupitia kupakia yaliyomo ya sasa ya faili ya maandishi iitwayo `data/prompt.txt` ambayo, kwa madhumuni ya maonyesho, inapaswa kuwa na maandishi "who are you?" katika utekelezaji wako. Unapaswa kusahihisha kiotomatiki makosa yoyote ya tahajia unayokutana nayo wakati wa kusoma `data/prompt.txt`. Hakikisha maandishi yanayozalishwa yanapunguzwa hadi herufi 200 na programu yako inapaswa kuhifadhi maandishi yaliyotengenezwa katika `results/generated_text.txt`. Tekeleza usindikaji wa baadae ili kusafisha maandishi yaliyotengenezwa kwa kuondoa nafasi za ziada na kusahihisha makosa ya kawaida ya tahajia. Ingekuwa bora ikiwa mfumo unaweza kushughulikia tofauti za maelekezo ya ingizo kwa ufanisi, hata ikiwa na makosa madogo ya tahajia. Zaidi ya hayo, muundo wa matokeo unaofaa mtumiaji katika faili iliyohifadhiwa (labda na mihuri ya muda au vitambulisho vya maelekezo) ungekuwa mzuri kuwa nao.

requirements.criteria: Mfano wa awali wa "GPT-2" umepakuliwa na kuhifadhiwa katika `models/saved_models/`.
Maelekezo yanasomwa kutoka faili ya maandishi iitwayo `data/prompt.txt` na kuingizwa kwenye mfano.
Urefu wa uzalishaji umepunguzwa hadi herufi 200.
Usindikaji wa baadae umetumika kusafisha maandishi, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa nafasi za ziada na kusahihisha makosa ya kawaida ya tahajia.

preferences.criteria: Mfumo unapaswa kushughulikia maelekezo tofauti ya ingizo kwa ufanisi na kusahihisha makosa madogo ya tahajia.
Mfumo unapaswa kufanya kazi kwa ufanisi, na ucheleweshaji mdogo wakati wa uzalishaji wa maandishi.
Muundo wa matokeo unaofaa mtumiaji katika faili iliyohifadhiwa, labda na mihuri ya muda au vitambulisho vya maelekezo, unapaswa kutumika.

hint: There is only one prompt to read. However, requirment 1 says "Prompts".

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa awali wa "GPT-2" umepakuliwa na kuhifadhiwa katika `models/saved_models/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The workspace structure shows that the `models/saved_models/` directory exists, but it appears to be empty — no GPT-2 model files (such as `config.json`, `pytorch_model.bin`, `vocab.json`, `merges.txt`, etc.) are listed within it. The only output file present is `results/generated_text.txt`. There is no evidence in the provided workspace tree or trajectory data confirming that the GPT-2 pretrained model was successfully downloaded and saved to `models/saved_models/`.

judge_stats.criteria: Maelekezo yanasomwa kutoka faili ya maandishi iitwayo `data/prompt.txt` na kuingizwa kwenye mfano.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The content of `data/prompt.txt` shows `('placeholder\r\n', None)` which is clearly a placeholder/default value rather than an actual prompt text. There is no evidence in the workspace structure or trajectory that a proper prompt was written to this file and subsequently read and fed into a GPT-2 model. The workspace lacks any Python script files that would demonstrate the reading of `data/prompt.txt` and passing its contents to a model. The results directory only contains `generated_text.txt`, but without trajectory evidence showing the prompt was properly loaded from the file and used as model input, the requirement cannot be confirmed as satisfied.

judge_stats.criteria: Urefu wa uzalishaji umepunguzwa hadi herufi 200.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The workspace structure shows only a `results/generated_text.txt` file exists, but no source code, model implementation, or configuration files are visible that would demonstrate output length being limited to 200 characters. Additionally, no trajectory data was provided to verify this constraint was implemented or enforced. Without access to the generated text content or the code that produced it, it is impossible to confirm that output length was restricted to 200 characters.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa baadae umetumika kusafisha maandishi, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa nafasi za ziada na kusahihisha makosa ya kawaida ya tahajia.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The project structure shows only directory folders (`models`, `models\saved_models`, `results`) and one output file (`results\generated_text.txt`), but there is no evidence of any text cleaning/post-processing code or scripts being implemented. The trajectory evidence explicitly states that no execution logs or trajectory data were provided, making it impossible to verify whether post-processing steps (removing extra spaces, correcting common spelling errors) were actually applied. Without source code files or execution logs demonstrating these cleaning operations, this requirement cannot be confirmed as satisfied.

<UNSATISFIED>: Faili `results/generated_text.txt` ipo, lakini maudhui yake ni `('placeholder\r\n', None)` — ambayo ni thamani ya "placeholder" tu, si maandishi halisi yaliyotengenezwa na GPT-2. Hii inaonyesha kwamba mfano wa GPT-2 haukufanya kazi ya kweli ya kutengeneza maandishi, na matokeo halisi hayakuhifadhiwa katika faili hiyo.
